Video.summary: Keenan Ivory Wayans recalls how his first appearance on the show, in 1986, was the highlight of his career.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Keenan Ivory Wayans (1/16/92)

Image.alt: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Keenan Ivory Wayans (1/16/92)

Video.summary: Woody Harrelson joins Johnny again, this time talking about....doing Yoga before joining the show.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '90s - Woody Harrelson (3/20/92)

Video.summary: Jimmy Stewart describes an evening at the celebrity-fave nightclub when young Judy Garland showed up and sang.
Video.title: Hollywood Icons Of The '50s - Jimmy Stewart (12/27/89)

Video.summary: Carnac the Magnificent stops by. Jimmy Stewart reminisces about his career. The Manhattan Transfer performs.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Jimmy Stewart, Don Adams, The Manhattan Transfer (5/14/80)

Image.alt: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Jimmy Stewart, Don Adams, The Manhattan Transfer (5/14/80)
The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Jimmy Stewart, Don Adams, The Manhattan Transfer (5/14/80)
The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Jimmy Stewart, Don Adams, The Manhattan Transfer (5/14/80)

Video.summary: Dudley Moore got his star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame then sings a song. Bob Uecker's nickname was "Stinko."
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dudley Moore, Bob Uecker (9/23/87)

Image.alt: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Dudley Moore, Bob Uecker (9/23/87)

Video.summary: Eddie Murphy discusses his hero Richard Pryor, and talks about his film Trading Places.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '80s - Eddie Murphy (6/24/83)

Video.summary: Drew Carey talks about cold weather and global warming. Fellow guests are David Steinberg and Regis Philbin.

Video.summary: Hog wild: That’s Jay Leno who owns 17 motorcycles. Plus Raquel Welch discusses children and getting older.

Video.summary: Leo Durocher talks retirement, Don Rickles accidentally bumps Ed but gives him a kiss to make up for it.
Video.title: The Very Best of Johnny and Guests - Leo Durocher, Don Rickles, Olga Fikotová (11/14/73)

Video.summary: Father and daughter night! Comedian Richard Pryor accompanies his daughter, actress Rain Pryor.
